family: side asymmetry + cross-asset confirmation (variants OFF flagship reversal_v2)
split: chronological first 2/3 TRAIN (idx 1-11519) / last 1/3 TEST (11520-17279) on the 17280-interval 5m grid; six 10d folds of 2880 intervals; 1h-block (12-interval) bootstrap, B=4000, common-block resampling for paired deltas
fee_model: EV = q - p - 0.07*p*(1-p); primary fill .4774 (censored <=.53 ledger mean), sensitivities .4874/.4974; q*(.4774)=.4949

side_asym_60d.note: sign-consistent TRAIN/TEST and 4/6 folds but p=.32 on 60d; house bar (dozens of tests) not met

tiezone.note: buy-Down LOSES ties yet still wins more ex-tie-zone; mechanical tie penalty does not explain away fadeUP advantage, but delta stays insignificant

pm_side_pricing_20s.note: no side pricing skew beyond noise; book prices contrarian Down ~= Up

ledger_155_by_side.note: live side split has OPPOSITE sign to candles and flips again under the 53c censoring - pure noise at n~60-80; corroborates do-not-encode

joint_impulse_eth8.note: 92% of 12bps BTC impulses are ETH-confirmed >=8bps same-dir; filter nudges q +0.2/+0.3pp (TRAIN/TEST, same sign) but is insignificant, drops 8% volume whose complement is ~breakeven (TRAIN q=.5000 -> +0.5c at .4774), and tilts to larger moves (fills 1-2c richer per confirmed adjustment) - does NOT beat flagship like-for-like

eth_thr_sweep.note: TEST-only gradient, TRAIN flat = the program's standing kill pattern; do not tighten the ETH threshold

verdicts.side_asymmetry_encoding: DEAD - direction stable (fadeUP better) but p=.32, live ledger flips sign, no fill-side skew; the house warning's regime-artifact read stands; value is the null: pooled flagship construction is correct
verdicts.joint_eth_confirmation: WEAK - matches flagship (it IS 92% of it), +0.2/+0.3pp same-sign lift, p=.36+; supportive mechanism evidence that the reversal impulse is market-wide, not BTC-idiosyncratic; not worth live encoding, cheap as a zero-stake shadow only
